images.depicts: glowing full moon over rocky/starry ground, no mat
small grey mouse sitting up on textured teal ground
close-up baby monkey face, hands clasped, no mat
cotton string mop standing upright on floor
ripe golden mango with dew, resting on leaves
smooth swirled teal/gold/red abstract festival mask, oval eyeholes, no fringe
small glass bottle of milk with gold cap
old folded paper map, partly open
glowing moon resting directly on a woven mat
mouse sitting directly on a woven mat, paws touching it
monkey airborne several inches above a woven mat, no contact
images.issue: wrong preposition: monkey is floating/mid-air above the mat, not touching it — reads as 'above the mat' not 'on the mat'

images.depicts: mop lying flat, resting directly on a woven mat
mango resting directly on a woven mat
a fringed, feathered, beaded tribal-style mask lying on a woven mat
images.issue: cast/prop drift: this mask is a totally different design (fringed/tribal, teeth showing) than the plain mask.png card (smooth swirled abstract, no fringe) — same object should look consistent across card and book

images.depicts: peg-doll girl, black pigtails, red dress, sitting cross-legged on a woven mat
raw potato on a woven mat, peg-doll girl peeking in from edge
images.issue: cast drift: Segina's doll here has shinier/textured hair, more detailed face, and a sleeveless lace-textured dress — differs from her simpler matte-hair, dot-eyed, long-sleeved look in segina-on-mat.png

missing_assets.issue: listed in spec assets[] and required for the week's own anchor word 'mat', but the file does not exist anywhere in the images folder
listed in spec assets[] but does not exist in the images folder
